metadata.name: Presidents' Day Theme
metadata.description: Patriotic red, white, and blue theme for Presidents' Day

activeRange.note: Week of Presidents' Day (3rd Monday in February)

banner.title: Celebrate Presidents' Day at Hikari Sushi
banner.subtitle: Honor the legacy of great leaders with exceptional sushi and unforgettable flavors.
banner.celebrationSubtext: We're open today - come celebrate with us!
banner.inviteSub: Celebrate with fresh sushi, handcrafted rolls, and exceptional flavors.

quotes.text: In any moment of decision, the best thing you can do is the right thing.
quotes.author: Theodore Roosevelt

quotes.text: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
quotes.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

quotes.text: Ask not what your country can do for you – ask what you can do for your country.
quotes.author: John F. Kennedy

quotes.text: A house divided against itself cannot stand.
quotes.author: Abraham Lincoln

quotes.text: It is better to offer no excuse than a bad one.
quotes.author: George Washington
